items.title: Sinner beats Djokovic, returns to Wimbledon final
items.summary: Top-ranked Jannik Sinner will play for his second consecutive Wimbledon title after defeating seven-time champion Novak Djokovic 6-4, 6-4, 6-4 in the semifinals Friday.
